Pricing Features Sign In

Stop doing office work.
Your AI team does it together.

Pitch decks, proposals, research, outreach, hiring — describe what you need, and a team of AI agents works together to deliver it. Cowork meets OpenClaw — for founders.

All plans include hosted sandbox execution and bring-your-own-key support.

Sign In View Plans

Your AI team includes

ResearcherCopywriterAnalystDesignerEditorSEOData

Everything you need to ship faster

🤝

AI Team, Not a Chatbot

Multiple agents collaborate on your task — researcher, copywriter, analyst, editor — each doing what they do best.

📋

10 Ready-Made Templates

Pitch decks, prospecting pipelines, proposals, research briefs, content repurposing, and more — one click to start.

📦

Real Deliverables

Download actual files — slide decks, CSV exports, branded proposals, formatted updates. Not just chat responses.

🔑

Bring Your Own Key

Use your Anthropic API key. Your key, your usage, your control. Encrypted and never logged.

🏠

Self-Hosted & Private

Runs on your VPS in Docker. Your data never leaves your infrastructure.

🚀

Built for Founders

Stop doing office work yourself. Let your AI team handle the repetitive stuff while you focus on what matters.

Simple, transparent pricing

Every plan includes hosted sandbox execution and bring-your-own-key support. No hidden fees.

Hobby

For founders getting started with AI cowork

$19/month
  • 5 tasks per day
  • BYO Anthropic key
  • 30 min max per task
  • 1 concurrent task
  • All 10 cowork templates
